_comment: Stage 9e Miters (sharp miter at reflex): bevel TWO edges meeting at the L-shape's reflex corner — vertical reflex edge + horizontal edge to (1,0,+0.5). Exercises reflex-aware sharp miter: at v3 the BVs in the two non-BEV-BEV faces collapse onto v3 itself (instead of sliding into the missing quadrant), and only the BEV-BEV inner-bottom face keeps its perpendicular-meet BV. Detection via cross(n_F1, n_F2) · forward_edge_dir < 0 in hasAnyReflexBevEdge.
